---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement

---

## Summary
A clear and concise description of the feature.

## Problem it solves
What problem does this feature address? Who benefits?

## Proposed solution
Describe how you'd like the feature to work.

## Alternatives considered
Any alternative approaches you have thought about.

## Additional context
Mockups, links, or any other relevant information.
